name: ztag4_clear
description: zTag4::Clear tolerates null input and resets a tag to count zero with wildcard tag bytes.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zTag4::Clear: 17 unmasked mismatches with no relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 20 bytes and the VC object body is 32 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The reviewed byte drift is compact null-check/store shape for the four-byte tag payload; the native smoke verifies null tolerance and wildcard reset of count plus tag bytes.
